typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-extrabold text-[#0B2447]
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-bold text-[#0B2447]

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: bento grid for marketing, structured dense grid for dashboards

components.button_primary: bg-[#0B2447] text-white hover:bg-[#06162c] transition-colors rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium shadow-sm hover:shadow
components.button_secondary: bg-transparent text-[#0B2447] border border-[#0B2447] hover:bg-[#F8F9FA] transition-colors rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium
components.button_accent: bg-[#1565C0] text-white hover:bg-[#11529c] transition-colors rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium shadow-sm hover:shadow
components.card_surface: bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#E5E7EB] rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
components.input_field: w-full border border-[#C8C8C8] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-[#2b2b2b] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1565C0] focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all
components.dashboard_sidebar: bg-[#0B2447] text-white h-screen fixed w-64 flex flex-col

hero_building.description: Modern bank building exterior for hero section or about page

business_meeting.description: Business meeting handshake for business banking or commercial loans section

family_home.description: Family celebrating new home for mortgage / personal loans section

credit_card.description: Credit card close-up for credit cards page

mobile_banking.description: Person using phone and credit card for mobile banking page

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Next.js / Tailwind CSS / Supabase stack.
Implement multi-step forms using React state management or Next.js App Router query params for the 7-step account opening.
Ensure all pages requested are implemented: Home, 9 Service Pages, About/Services/FAQ/Security/Contact, Sign In, Open Account, Customer Dashboard, Admin Dashboard.
Follow Deep Navy / White / Silver / Blue Accent scheme strictly. NO dark mode.
Sticky top nav should have Deep Navy background with White text.
Use Manrope for headings and Inter for body text.
Use data-testid on all interactive elements.
Integrate Shadcn primitives for complex components (Dialog, Tabs, Table) but customized to fit the premium banking feel.
Avoid excessive gradients; use clean solid colors with soft shadows (shadow-sm) to match the premium, trustworthy aesthetic of a US Bank.
